summary: All 3 critical bug fixes VERIFIED WORKING: 1) bank_transfer_requests collection is now checked in category limits - Bank USED = 108,010 PRC (correctly counting all collections). 2) bank_transfer_requests collection is now checked in cooling period - returns 429 with '7 days' message. 3) Limit check prevents withdrawal exceeding available limit - remaining = 0 when used > limit.
critical_code_review_comments: redeem_categories.py (lines 308-326): Bank category now correctly includes bank_transfer_requests collection with multiple field checks (total_prc_deducted, prc_deducted, total_prc)
manual_bank_transfer.py (lines 410-430): Cooling period now checks ALL THREE collections: bank_withdrawal_requests, redeem_requests, AND bank_transfer_requests
server.py (lines 3796-3803): get_user_all_time_redeemed now includes bank_transfer_requests collection
'Paid' status is correctly included in success_statuses list for all calculations
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test data in bank_transfer_requests collection
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 bug fixes verified working. Bank USED = 108,010 PRC (correctly counting all collections including bank_transfer_requests). 7-day cooling period blocks with message 'Bank transfer is limited to ONE per week. Please wait 7 days before requesting another bank transfer.' Test data in bank_transfer_requests: 2 records (BTR-20260320124631 with Paid status, BTR-20260321150000 with pending status).

fix_1_bank_transfer_requests_in_category.details: Bank category now checks bank_transfer_requests collection with fields: total_prc_deducted, prc_deducted, total_prc

fix_2_bank_transfer_requests_in_cooling_.error_message: Bank transfer is limited to ONE per week. Please wait 7 days before requesting another bank transfer.
fix_2_bank_transfer_requests_in_cooling_.details: Cooling period now checks ALL THREE collections: bank_withdrawal_requests, redeem_requests, bank_transfer_requests

fix_3_get_user_all_time_redeemed.evidence: Bank USED > 100,000 PRC confirms bank_transfer_requests is included
fix_3_get_user_all_time_redeemed.details: get_user_all_time_redeemed now includes bank_transfer_requests with fields: total_prc_deducted, prc_deducted, total_prc, prc_amount

fix_4_limit_check_prevents_exceeding.details: Limit check correctly calculates remaining = max(0, limit - used)

rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: manual_bank_transfer route saves to 'bank_transfer_requests' collection, but this collection was NOT being checked in: 1) Category limits calculation (redeem_categories.py), 2) Cooling period check (manual_bank_transfer.py), 3) Total redeemed calculation (server.py get_user_all_time_redeemed)
reproduction_steps: 1. User makes bank transfer via manual_bank_transfer route
3. Category limits API returns Bank USED = 0 (not checking bank_transfer_requests)
4. User can make another request within 7 days (cooling period not checking bank_transfer_requests)
5. User can exceed limit (limit check not counting bank_transfer_requests)
mitigation: Added bank_transfer_requests to category limits calculation (redeem_categories.py lines 308-326)
Added bank_transfer_requests to cooling period check (manual_bank_transfer.py lines 410-430)
